briefs.title: Strata building inspections now require updated professional credentials under BC rules
briefs.summary: BC updated the rules for who can conduct certain strata (condo building) inspections and reports. Qualified professionals must now be registered with specific engineering or technical associations, and architects or architectural technologists are added to the approved list.
briefs.action_required: If you hire inspectors for strata reports, confirm they hold current registration with APEGBC, AIBC, or ASTTBC.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Landlord & Property Mgmt, Professional Services
